title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music service curated by musicians and designed to accompany thinking and building activities. The playlist is made and curated specifically for people working on technical or creative tasks.
writeup: The video introduces Claude FM, a music service curated by musicians and built to accompany thinking and building. The playlist is assembled specifically for people working on technical or creative tasks. The takeaway is a focused listening option positioned for work sessions rather than general streaming.
